title: rubus × hollandrei f. intermedius
intro: Rubus × hollandrei f. intermedius, a hybrid of the black raspberry and purple raspberry, is a type of bramble or thorny shrub native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. This plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus × hollandrei f. intermedius include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and act as an anti-aging agent due to its high content of ellagic acid and anthocyanins. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used to support skin health and reduce inflammation.
